``` --- **`.gitignore`** — Tells Git which files to never commit. `node_modules` is huge and auto-generated, `.env` contains secret keys. Place it in: **root** (`/CardGame/`) ``` node_modules dist .env .env.local .DS_Store ``` --- **`.env.example`** — A safe template showing what environment variables the project needs, without exposing real secrets. Anyone cloning your repo will know what to fill in. Place it in: **root** (`/CardGame/`) ``` # Copy this file to .env and fill in your Supabase credentials. # Get these from: https://supabase.com → your project → Settings → API VITE_SUPABASE_URL=https://your-project-ref.supabase.co VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY=your-anon-key-here
